_note: Daemon detachment modifiers — game mechanics only. Engine loads this for DPP/SURV/MOB computation. Modeled as always-on unless noted.

DAEMONIC INCURSION._engine_note: Verified 11e from 40k.app. Warp Rifts: LEGIONES DAEMONICA Deep Strike >6" instead of >8" when wholly within Shadow of Chaos or within 6" of matching Greater Daemon. Denizens of the Warp: stratagem for >6" Deep Strike anywhere (no condition).

choices.name: Warp Rifts
choices.condition: Deep Strike >6" instead of >8" when wholly within Shadow of Chaos or near matching-god Greater Daemon
choices.description: Improved Deep Strike placement range (Flexibility: >6" instead of >8")
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. movement_bonus approximates Deep Strike deployment flexibility. Base Daemon Deep Strike is >8"; Warp Rifts reduces to >6" conditional on Shadow of Chaos or Greater Daemon proximity.

choices.name: Denizens of the Warp
choices.condition: 1CP stratagem: >6" Deep Strike anywhere (no Shadow of Chaos condition), still 6" charge per GH
choices.description: Mobile Deep Strike positioning via stratagem — >6" anywhere
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. 1CP stratagem to Deep Strike >6" anywhere (no Shadow of Chaos condition needed per 11e version). GH notes the >6" charge distance may be errata'd.

SHADOW LEGION._engine_note: Verified 11e from 40k.app. Thralls of the First Prince allows up to 1000pts HERETIC ASTARTES (Strike Force). Four sub-god abilities + Undivided Dark Pacts. Key correction: Khorne is shoot+charge on Advance (NOT Lethal Hits as previously fabricated).

choices.name: First Prince of Chaos - Khorne
choices.condition: Khorne: Murderer's Cowl — eligible to shoot and charge in a turn it Advanced
choices.description: SHADOW LEGION KHORNE units can shoot and charge after Advancing
choices._engine_note: PREVIOUSLY FABRICATED as lethal_hits: true. Real 11e rule (Murderer's Cowl): eligible to shoot AND charge after Advancing. This is a MOB effect, not DPP. Corrected per 40k.app.

choices.name: First Prince of Chaos - Tzeentch
choices.condition: Tzeentch: Penumbral Puppetry — Stealth, -1 to hit in melee
choices.description: SHADOW LEGION TZEENTCH units have Stealth (-1 to hit from ranged) and -1 to hit in melee
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. Penumbral Puppetry grants Stealth AND -1 to hit in melee. Confirmed against GH article which noted the change prevents double-stacking with cover.

choices.name: First Prince of Chaos - Nurgle
choices.condition: Nurgle: Gloam Rot — S > T = -1 to wound the unit
choices.description: SHADOW LEGION NURGLE units have -1 to wound when attacker's S > target's T. Cannot be modelled as simple numeric SURV modifier.
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. -1 to wound when S > T. Engine doesn't model defensive -1 to wound. No numeric modifier applied. PREVIOUSLY had incorrect cover_save modifier — stripped.

choices.name: First Prince of Chaos - Slaanesh
choices.condition: Slaanesh: Shadow's Caress — immune to all Snap Shooting
choices.description: SHADOW LEGION SLAANESH units immune to all Snap Shooting. No DPP/SURV/MOB modifier applicable.
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. Shadow's Caress: enemy units cannot target with snap shooting attacks (not just Overwatch). Removed previously fabricated sustained_hits_extra.

choices.name: Dark Pacts (Undivided)
choices.condition: Undivided: Dark Pacts — choose Lethal Hits OR Sustained Hits 1 per activation
choices.description: SHADOW LEGION UNDIVIDED units have Dark Pacts (choose Lethal or Sustained per activation). Modelled as Lethal Hits for DPP.
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. Dark Pacts: auto-pass Leadership test for BE'LAKOR. Choose Lethal or Sustained 1 per activation. Modelled as always-on Lethal for DPP estimation (underestimates vs hordes, overestimates vs elites). CSM units gain Deep Strike.

choices.name: Unholy Avalanche
choices.condition: MOUNTED units: Fall Back can still shoot/charge
choices.description: Mounted units: can Fall Back and shoot/charge
choices._engine_note: Confirmed by GH article: 'Your MOUNTED units can fall back and shoot and charge.' REMOVED previous fabricated advance_and_charge — article does not grant advance+charge. Skull Cannons (MOUNTED) benefit from the Fall Back and shoot.

choices.name: Warp-Riders
choices.condition: 1CP stratagem: MOUNTED unit gains MOBILE keyword (move through ruins/terrain)
choices.description: 1CP stratagem: MOUNTED unit gains MOBILE keyword — can move through ruins and terrain features
choices._engine_note: Confirmed by GH article: 'That unit has MOBILE.' MOBILE allows moving through terrain, not +3" movement. Previous movement_bonus: 3 was incorrect. No numeric modifier applied — MOBILE is a terrain interaction keyword, not a speed stat change.

choices.name: Loci of Power
choices.condition: non-MONSTER CHARACTER: +1 Ld, +1 OC
choices.description: Character units gain +1 Leadership and +1 Objective Control. No DPP/SURV/MOB numeric modifier applicable.
choices._engine_note: Confirmed by GH article: 'Your non-MONSTER CHARACTER models get +1Ld and +1OC.' PREVIOUSLY FABRICATED as Stealth — real rule is +1 Ld +1 OC, which the engine cannot model as a numeric modifier.

choices.name: Swollen with Power
choices.condition: upgrade enhancement: +2 Wounds for non-MONSTER CHARACTER
choices.description: Characters gain +2 Wounds from upgrade enhancement
choices._engine_note: Confirmed by GH article: 'Upgrade: This model gets +2 Wounds.' PREVIOUSLY FABRICATED as invulnerable_save: 4 — real rule is +2 wounds. Engine doesn't model max wounds changes as a SURV modifier.

choices.name: Shudderblink
choices.condition: BATTLELINE: Assault on ranged weapons when advancing, and can Advance and charge
choices.description: Battleline units can Advance and charge. Ranged weapons gain Assault when advancing (not always-on).
choices._engine_note: Confirmed by GH article: 'Your BATTLELINE units get ASSAULT on their ranged weapons when they advance, and can advance and charge.' Removed always-on `assault: true` — the Assault keyword is conditional on advancing.

choices.name: Daemonic Infestation
choices.condition: 1CP stratagem: heal 3 wounds in Command phase (not FNP)
choices.description: 1CP stratagem: heal 3 wounds for a BATTLELINE unit (not Pink Horrors). CP-dependent healing, not FNP.
choices._engine_note: Confirmed by GH article: '1CP, used in your Command phase. Pick a BATTLELINE unit other than PINK HORRORS; that unit heals 3 wounds.' PREVIOUSLY FABRICATED as feel_no_pain: 5 — real rule is heal 3 wounds, a different mechanic. No always-on modifier applied.

BLOOD LEGION._engine_note: Verified 11e from 40k.app. Purge the Foe disposition. Two detachment rules: Murdercall (reactive surge) + Blood Tainted (objective control after killing on objective). Gore-Hungry Onslaught is now a move-through-terrain stratagem (not Sustained Hits as previously fabricated).

choices.name: Murdercall
choices.condition: enemy ends move within 8" → D6" surge move
choices.description: LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE units make D6" reactive surge move when enemy ends within 8"
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. Surge move D6" (avg 3.5", rounded to 3). Trigger: enemy ends Normal/Advance/Fall Back within 8". Reactive positioning, not a speed stat change.

choices.name: Blood Tainted
choices.condition: objective marker stays under control after Khorne unit kills enemy on it
choices.description: Objective remains under your control after Khorne unit destroys enemy within range, until opponent has greater control. No DPP/SURV/MOB modifier.
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. Board control rule — objective marker stays under your control until opponent overtakes it. No numeric modifier applicable.

choices.name: Gore-Hungry Onslaught
choices.condition: 1CP stratagem: move through terrain features for KHORNE unit
choices.description: 1CP stratagem: KHORNE unit can move through terrain features (not Sustained Hits). No always-on modifier.
choices._engine_note: PREVIOUSLY FABRICATED as sustained_hits_extra: 1. In 11e, this is a 1CP stratagem allowing movement through terrain features (Strategic Ploy). No always-on DPP modifier. Stripped per AGENTS.md.

choices.name: Wrath Undeniable
choices.condition: 1CP stratagem: fight on death for KHORNE unit
choices.description: 1CP stratagem: KHORNE unit fights on death. Cannot be modelled as FNP.
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. 1CP fight-on-death stratagem. Not always-on. PREVIOUSLY MODELLED as FNP5+ — stripped.

SCINTILLATING LEGION._engine_note: Verified 11e from 40k.app. Priority Assets disposition. Fates in Flux: 3 Flux tokens start, spend to re-roll any roll for TZEENTCH; opponent gains tokens too; gain one per Command phase if opponent has any. Pyrogenesis and Flickering Reality correctly identified as stratagems.

choices.name: Fates in Flux
choices.condition: Spend Flux token to re-roll any Advance/Hit/Wound/Damage/save/Hazardous roll for TZEENTCH unit
choices.description: TZEENTCH units can spend Flux tokens to re-roll any roll (modelled as re-roll hits for DPP estimation)
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. 3 Flux tokens starting. Can re-roll ANY roll (not just hits). Modelled as reroll_hits: all which underestimates utility (tokens also re-roll wounds, saves, damage, etc.). Conditional on resource management — modelled as always-on for DPP estimation.

choices.name: Pyrogenesis
choices.condition: 1CP stratagem: +2S or spend Flux token for +3S +1AP for TZEENTCH unit
choices.description: 1CP stratagem: TZEENTCH unit gets +2S, or +3S +1AP with Flux token. No always-on modifier.
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. 1CP stratagem, not always-on. PREVIOUSLY HAD extra_ap: -1. Stripped per AGENTS.md.

choices.name: Flickering Reality
choices.condition: 1CP stratagem: roll D6, opponent's hit roll of that result ends attack sequence
choices.description: 1CP stratagem: TZEENTCH unit gets 'no hit on X' defensive effect. No always-on modifier.
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. 1CP stratagem where you roll a D6 (can re-roll with Flux token); unmodified hit rolls of that result end attack sequence. PREVIOUSLY HAD invulnerable_save: 3. Stripped per AGENTS.md.

PLAGUE LEGION._engine_note: Verified 11e from 40k.app. Take and Hold disposition. Melancholic Miasma: NURGLE units extend Shadow of Chaos 9" around them AND force enemy in Shadow to battleshock each Command phase. Seeping Virulence is critical hits on 5+ in Fight phase (correctly identified after stripping fabricated sustained_hits). Rot and Renewal is CP-dependent healing.

choices.name: Melancholic Miasma
choices.condition: NURGLE units: enemies within 9" are in Shadow of Chaos; enemy in Shadow must battleshock each Command phase
choices.description: NURGLE units extend Shadow of Chaos 9" and force enemy battleshock tests. No DPP/SURV/MOB modifier.
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. Two effects: (1) enemy within 9" of NURGLE is in Shadow of Chaos; (2) each Command phase, select one enemy in Shadow — that unit takes battleshock test. PREVIOUSLY HAD stealth: true. Stripped — this is a board control rule, not defensive buff.

choices.name: Seeping Virulence
choices.condition: 1CP stratagem (Fight phase): critical hits on 5+ for NURGLE unit in melee
choices.description: 1CP stratagem: NURGLE unit gets critical hits on 5+ in melee. No always-on modifier.
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. 1CP Fight phase stratagem giving critical hits on 5+ (for both Sustained and Lethal if applicable). PREVIOUSLY HAD sustained_hits_extra: 1 — stripped as CP-dependent.

choices.name: Rot and Renewal
choices.condition: 1CP stratagem: return 1 model, D3 for BATTLELINE, or heal D3+1 for MONSTER
choices.description: 1CP stratagem: NURGLE healing/model return. No always-on modifier.
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. 1CP Command phase stratagem: return 1 destroyed model (D3 for BATTLELINE), or heal D3+1 wounds for MONSTER. PREVIOUSLY HAD feel_no_pain: 5 — stripped as CP-dependent.

LEGION OF EXCESS._engine_note: Verified 11e from 40k.app. Priority Assets disposition. Beguiling Aura: charge after Fall Back for SLAANESH. Seductive Gambit: after charge, trade Fights First for re-roll all hits and re-roll wounds of 1. False Majesty is an enhancement aura (+1 to wound). Config was correct from 10e — no 11e changes to these rules.

choices.name: Beguiling Aura
choices.condition: SLAANESH units eligible to charge after Falling Back
choices.description: LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH units can charge after Falling Back
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. Rule unchanged from 10e.

choices.name: Seductive Gambit
choices.condition: after Charge move, trade Fights First for re-roll all hits and re-roll wounds of 1 until end of turn
choices.description: SLAANESH units: after charge, trade Fights First for re-roll all hits and wounds of 1
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. Conditional: must declare after Charge move, lose Fights First for rest of turn. Modelled as always-on for DPP estimation.

choices.name: False Majesty
choices.condition: 30pt enhancement (Aura): +1 to wound in melee for friendly SLAANESH non-MONSTER units within 6"
choices.description: 30pt enhancement aura: +1 to wound for SLAANESH units within 6". No always-on detachment modifier.
choices._engine_note: Verified from 40k.app. This is a 30pt enhancement (Aura) giving +1 to wound in melee for friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH units within 6". Enhancement, not detachment rule — costs points. Previously modelled as plus1_to_wound which overestimates reach (it's aura-limited).
